spec.name: Soul Counter Sphere
spec.summary: disrupts soul energy in a spherical envelope with active regulation while it runs
spec.effect_description: The caster inscribes a sigil that disrupts soul energy in a spherical envelope with active regulation while it runs. Effect range: line-of-sight. Persistence: latched.
